item.title: Pioneer Stereo Receiver - $48 (Cumberland)
item.description: Pioneer Stereo Receiver #SX-201. Serial MK3964138C. Estimate mid 1990's. No Damage to Case. Pick Up.

item.title: Cambridge Audio Topaz SR20 Stereo Receiver - $249 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Cambridge Audio Topaz SR20 stereo receiver in excellent condition with remote control and power cord. 100 watts per channel of crisp clear sound. Awesome and powerful receiver for $249 firm.

item.title: Yamaha Stereo Receiver and Sony Speakers - $40 (North Kingstown)
item.description: Yamaha RX-V540 stereo receiver

item.title: Sound Design Turntable Cassette Radio AUX IN 6821M - $25 (Newport)
item.description: Stereo for sale

item.title: Stereo receiver - Pyle PT 390AU - $150 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: new. still in original box. used only once.

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Vintage Realistic Optimus 1B Stereo Speakers - $69 (Cranston)
item.description: Sweet pair of vintage Realistic Optimus 1B stereo speakers in very good condition and sound great. Grills and drivers are super clean. Cabinets are very good with some nicks and discoloration but look nice for their age. I will demo them for you in my garage. Cool vintage speakers for $69 firm.

item.title: STEREO ELECTRIC MISTRESS - $100
item.description: NEW IN BOX

item.title: AC power cord cable IEC C7 polarized TV STEREO APPLIANCE - $5 (cranston)
item.description: *See pic* IEC C7 polarized

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Acoustic Research AR 215PS Compact Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $79 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice pair of Acoustic Research AR 215 compact bookshelf stereo speakers. They have nice binding posts and sound great. I will demo them for you. Great little speakers for $79 firm.

item.title: PreSonus HP2 Personal Headphone Amplifier with Power Supply and Stereo - $60 (Bristol)
item.description: PreSonus HP2 Personal Headphone Amplifier

item.title: Korg DW-8000/EX-8000 Preload Programs Cassette - $20 (N. RI)
item.description: This tape sold for $49/95 from Rondo Music & shipping & tax. Buy mine for $20.

item.title: Stereo Microphone And Wind Muff for Apple iOS Devices iM2 I-pad/I-Pod - $20 (Chepachet)
item.description: I have two of these, each with the TEAC wind muff/

item.title: Plinius M16 Audiophile Stereo Preamplifier - $1,199 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice high end Plinius M16 preamp in excellent condition and sounds amazing. Revision 1A. 6 RCA inputs, 1 balanced input and 3 outputs, 2 RCA and one balanced. Heavy duty remote control and owners manual included. Although this says phono on one of the inputs, it does not have the optional phono stage built in so you need to use an external phono preamplifier. The phono input is a normal line level input and can take componenets like CD players, tuners, etc... Plinius is known for a warm tube-like sound. This is dead quiet and sounds fantastic. I will demonstrate it's functionality for you. Great preamp for $1199 firm.

item.title: Amazing Audio Research LS2 Hybrid Tube/SS Stereo Preamplifier - $999 (Cranston)
item.description: This Audio Research LS2 preamp uses one 6DJ8 tube. It is a hybrid tube/solid state design. It sounds super transparent and really lets an amplifier sound it's best. There are very positive reviews online. 5 sets of RCA inputs and one set balanced. 2 RCA outputs and 2 balanced. This model has no remote control. Clean condition, works great and sounds amazing. I will demonstrate it for you. Nice high end preamp from one of the best audio companies out there for $1099 firm.

item.title: Polk Audio RTi70 Floorstanding Stereo Speakers - $179 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful pair of Polk Audio RTi70 tower speakers in excellent condition and sound amazing. Dual 6.5"woofers, 1" tweeter and bottom firing bass port. Handle 250 watts per channel. 90db efficient at 1 watt/meter. 40Hz-26kHz frequency response. 9"W x 41-1/4"H x 12-1/4"D. I will play them for you in my garage. These older Polk speakers are known to be made sturdier and sound better then the newer similar models. You will love these speakers for $179 firm.

item.title: Long range FM antenna for stereo - $15 (Coventry)
item.description: If you ask ·" is it available " you will be blocked, reported and cursed..be warned! This is a folding FM roof or attic mount antenna. It is folded in the picture and is about 4 feet long and 4 feet wide when opened. Has never been outdoors, always was mounted in my attic. Picked up station approximately 75 miles away (Boston) areas.

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: Adcom GFP 555II Stereo Preamplifier with Phono Input - $189 (Cranston)
item.description: Adcom GFP 555II stereo preamplifier. 6 inputs, including a phono input for your turntable, and a processor loop for your equalizer etc... Excellent condition. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great preamp for $189 firm.

item.title: Adcom GFA-5400 Stereo Power Amplifier - $249 (Cranston)
item.description: Fantastic Adcom GFA-5400 stereo power amplifier in excellent condition. Works great and sounds amazing. 125 watts per channel. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. I also have a nice Adcom preamp for sale. Beautiful amp for $249 firm.

item.title: Adcom GFA-545 Stereo Amplifier 100 Watts Per Channel - $199 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Adcom GFA-545 stereo power amplifier. Super clean cosmetic condition and sounds amazing, especially for the money. It is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great amp for $199 firm.

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set with Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $300 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me. Please no chats.

item.title: Bose 201 V Speakers + Stereo - $140 (Providence, RI)
item.description: Speakers are barely used, like new. We have new cables for them as well. All included for $140. The speakers alone are sold for $235 on Amazon.

item.title: Vintage Zenith Circle of Sound Stereo - $250 (Attleboro)
item.description: Zenith Circle of Sound Stereo. In good overall condition. Both speakers in good condition and sound good. One channel is not working and the record player works but could use a tune up. $250

item.title: Grundig satellite 700 world receiver - $200 (Wakefield)
item.description: Grundig 700. $200 or best. Email only.

item.description: Two speakers

item.title: Onkyo Receiver - $200
item.description: Onkyo Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: ION USB Turntable - $100 (West Warwick)
item.description: New in the box turntable usb recorder $100

item.title: Galaxy Audio Any Spot Stero wireless In Ear Monitors - $199 (providence)
item.description: Used only 2 times like new priced to sell.Retail new for $329.99 plus Tax . The Galaxy Audio AS-1200 is a durable, reliable, high-fidelity monitoring system that will have your band playing their best! This system includes an AS-1200T transmitter with 210 selectable UHF frequencies, stereo or mono transmission, and a backlit LCD display. The AS-1200R receiver comes equipped with a built-in limiter and a backlit LCD display. If you're looking to expand your set in the future, the AS-1200 system is designed to work with ensembles of any size, pairing with an unlimited number of additional receivers.

item.title: Emotiva BASX PT-100 preamp stereo audophile sound system - $295 (Providence)
item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.title: Pioneer HTP-101 Home Theater System Vintage - $175
item.description: Pioneer HTP-101 Home Theater System Vintage

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.title: Very well made Strat "parts-caster" - $650
item.description: This is a parts strat made from quality parts

item.title: Bluetooth Speaker - $30 (Woonsocket)
item.description: Wireless stereo Bluetooth connectivity

item.title: Logitech C925e 1080p Business Webcam - Brand New Sealed - $50 (Bristol)
item.description: Logitech C925e HD webcam - brand new, never opened. Box is still factory-sealed (see photos).

item.title: Logitech MX Anywhere 3 Wireless Mouse - Bluetooth, Rechargeable - Blac - $30 (Bristol)
item.description: Selling my Logitech MX Anywhere 3 compact performance mouse in black. It's a great portable mouse for laptops or desktops - smooth metal scroll wheel, precise tracking, and the ability to pair with up to 3 different devices using the Easy-Switch button on the bottom.

item.title: Bose 201 Series III 2-Way Speakers (pair) - $35 (N. RI)
item.description: I used these as my front speakers in a 5-1 surround sound system. They sound great, but I have a very small bedroom and we need to get a larger bed so we don't have the room for the receiver and speakers (all is for sale here in different listings) so we're opting for a sounder to save room. They sound great and have no issues regarding sound, the enclosures show some wear. They are a great deal for $50 for the pair. I live in Chepachet (02814) so you know in advance how far you need to drive to pick them up. I only wish others would do that. I ask how far they are & they never reply.

item.title: Sony Electeret Condenser Cardiod Microphones - $35 (N. RI)
item.description: I used these for recording live bands & they did a good job. They take 1/8" jacks so they's work great with the Sony D-50 Pro digital recorder if you wanted more of a stereo field. I'm just trying to lighten my load and scale down, I just have too much stuff.

item.title: VPI HW-16.5 Vinyl Record Cleaning Machine - $499 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful and effective VPI HW-16.5 vinyl record cleaning machine in very good condition and works great. Power cord and owners manual included. These are $1200 new and sell for $600-$750 on eBay so this is a great deal at $499 firm.

item.title: Dell 390 Midtower desktop - $80 (Cranston)
item.description: Dell 390 Midtower desktop

item.title: Yamaha K60 - $50 (Coventry)
item.description: Will not respond to "is it available" no emails, chat only. Yamaha K60 double cassette deck with Dolby B and C noise reduction. In excellent condition. Not auto reverse originally purchased directly from Yamaha

item.title: FS: Crestron 12 x 60 watt amplifier - $250
item.description: For Sale: Crestron 12 x 60 amplifier. This was designed as a whole house amplifier, but it ideal for home theater. 60 watt into 8 ohms, 90 watts in 4 ohms, all channels driven. This was made in the USA by Amplifier Technologies (ATI) for Crestron.

item.title: Cambridge Audio Azur 840C CD Player - $349 (Cranston)
item.description: Cambridge Audio Azur 840C CD player in excellent condition with remote control and owner's manual. Fairly high end player and sounds fantastic. Heavy duty build quality. Even the remote control is heavy. I will demonstrate it's functionality for you. I also have the matching receiver for sale in another ad. Was $1500 new. Fantastic player for $349 firm.

item.title: Yaesu FT747GX with FP-757HD power supply HAM RADIO - $275
item.description: PRICE REDUCED 12/19 The Yaesu FT-747GX is a compact HF transceiver covering 160 to 10 meters amateur bands in SSB, CW and AM Modes. It also features a general coverage short wave receiver that tunes from 100 kHz to 30000 kHz. Other enhancements include: Squelch, Noise Blanker, Attenuator, CAT port, and 20 memories. Output power is 100 watts SSB/CW (AM 25W). The rear panel has an SO-239 antenna jack. Included is the FP757HD power supply with external speaker and MH-1 microphone.

item.title: SCEPTRE X195W-Naga 19" Widescreen LCD Monitor - $50 (New Bedford)

item.description: TV is in Excellent condition.

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $70 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.description: Craftsman tractor with all wheel steering. No mowing deck. Receiver hitch installed, only used to move around small trailer. Briggs & Stratton opposed twin engine.

item.title: Mutron Bi-Phase sound chart overlays - $75 (Westerly)
item.description: I have the 3 original sound chart overlays for the Mutron Bi-phase, a high end vintage phasor from the 1970's. These cardboard overlays fit on top of the knobs and switches on the unit to indicate the proper settings.

item.description: Selling my Kenwood KR-7400 vintage receiver.

item.description: Selling a Steinberg UR824 interface - very good condition. Eight preamps, 8 outputs, ADAT, two separate headphone outs, DSP MixFX. Works great! -- -$450

item.description: Receivers for sale, surround system, and others. Special 50% for black Friday at music house in big top flea market.
